Power_Query_Setup.Power Query M Code:
let
    SourceHtml = Text.FromBinary(Web.Contents("https://www.baseball-reference.com/teams/STL/2026.shtml")),
    CleanHtml = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(SourceHtml, "<!--", ""), "-->", ""),
    Source = Web.Page(Text.ToBinary(CleanHtml)),
    ValueBatting = Table.SelectRows(Source, each Text.Contains(Text.From([Caption]), "Value Batting")){0}[Data],
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(ValueBatting, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    PromotedHeaders

let
    SourceHtml = Text.FromBinary(Web.Contents("https://www.baseball-reference.com/teams/STL/2026.shtml")),
    CleanHtml = Text.Replace(Text.Replace(SourceHtml, "<!--", ""), "-->", ""),
    Source = Web.Page(Text.ToBinary(CleanHtml)),
    ValuePitching = Table.SelectRows(Source, each Text.Contains(Text.From([Caption]), "Value Pitching")){0}[Data],
    PromotedHeaders = Table.PromoteHeaders(ValuePitching, [PromoteAllScalars=true])
in
    PromotedHeaders
